segments.description: Opening with restrained percussion and tense score bed, spoken dialogue overlay present
Score builds with rising intensity and continued dialogue overlay, action SFX emerging
Heavier instrumental score with increased percussion and dialogue, leading to vocal cue
Music with audible vocal cues and lyrical hook, spoken overlay continues, high-energy action
Climactic music with vocals and dense action SFX, score remains dominant bed
Final vocal phrase and music fade with trailer call to action, intensity drops

summary: A high-energy trailer combining intense dialogue, action sound effects, and heavy metal music, building from a tense opening to a climactic peak with vocal cues from a recognizable song.

notableTransitions.label: final vocal phrase and music fade
